feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Output Items per Application Object Type
entry.content:
S/4HANA Public Cloud has the app Manage Output Items, unfortunately there is no option available to retrict the application types for specific business roles.

We have the requirement where different work streams would like to have a list that shows them only the output items relevant to them. Yes this can be achieved using filters, but that doesn't stop anyone viewing and actioning items for other areas of the business. E.g. someone in Purchasing accidently sending a sales invoice to a customer.

Has anyone been able to find a solution for this?

entry.title: How to create Cost Centres through template in SAP public cloud
entry.content:
Hello team,

How to create Cost Centres through template in SAP public cloud.
Or how to do mass creation of cost centers 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to achieve Cost of Poor Quality / Third Party Inspection in Public Cloud( V.Urgent)
entry.content:
Hi Everyone

Need some help on the topic 

1. Cost of poor Quality

2. Third Party inspection in QM

I need help on how to achieve these requirements in SAP Public Cloud as i have to show a demo to the customer. I have tried to find solutions but unable to do so if someone knows how to achieve this IN Public Cloud , Please help me on this its very urgent.

Pardeep

entry.title: Archiving of materials in S4 Public cloud
entry.content:
Is there any way to archive materials after deletion in SAP Public cloud. If there please suggest the Fiori.

Any leads will be highly appreciated

entry.title: Not able find in Test Tenant (SAP_LO_BC_VC_MODELING_PC)
entry.content:
Hi,


I am not able find the following catalogs in Test Tenant. As, I can understand, the TR of the scope Id's not moved to Test tenant.


Just I want to confirm, is this the correct reason? 


SAP_LO_BC_VC_MODELING_PC


Could you please help me to find the reason and do needful.


Regards,


Suresh


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: impact if business wants foreign currency valuation at functional currency level
entry.content:
Hi,

Please explain the below points .

1.We have a business requirement to change local currency SDG to USD for country Singapore. Regarding that how we proceed.

2.What are impact if business wants foreign currency valuation at functional currency level .

3.limitation of using functional currency.

4.Impact of functional currency in group reporting if we change for country Singapore company functional currency to freely define currency USD.

Thanks

entry.title: Currency Conversion calculation
entry.content: We have maintained new rate with "Currency Exchange Rate", however, system is picking old rate, which is pre delivered, while we post any transaction in the system in S4 HANA Public edition.

entry.title: Copying control from delivery document to billing document
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We found that the billing address in sold-to party cannot copy from delivery document but in sales order.

For example, user updated the sold-to party street address A to B in outbound delivery document. But the invoice generated did not retrieve and display the update address B. 

However, if user update the sold-to party information from address A to C in sales order, then the billing document address can retrieve the update address C.

Does s4hana public cloud support to copy the communication information eg. street address and telephone from delivery document to billing document? We seems cannot find relative copying control setting available in IMG?

entry.title: How to see my transports in Quality and Productive Systems?
entry.content:
Hi SAP support Team,

 

We want to see details of transport in Test System and in Production as well. Could you provide us Role name thus we can see those details?

Thank you.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Materials in plant not subject to ML even material master is properly maintained
entry.content: Not all materials are shown as relevant for ML in SAP Public Cloud, even though no issue found in material master.

entry.title: Refresh Object Page after Action Execution with Custom Entity
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am using the RAP Model with a Custom Entity and have implemented an Unmanaged Behavior Definition. I want to refresh the Object Page after executing an action.

However, since the Custom Entity does not have a projection, I cannot use the "use side effects" syntax in the projection. I have tried using "side effects affect ..." but the Object Page does not refresh.

Is there any way to refresh the Object Page when using a Custom Entity in RAP?

Thank a lot.

entry.title: how to bring consolidation group in the public cloud in EWM
entry.content: how to bring consolidation group in the public cloud? Please revert at the earliest

entry.title: Mass output management - FI accounting
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have a requirement for our current client, who is using an S/4HANA Public Cloud package, to automatically generate forms to be sent via email to customers, based on FI invoices.

Is it possible to achieve this automation and mass management through the Fiori app "Output Parameter Determination" (please note that we are not using FI-CA)?

The requirements are as follows:

  • Form generation must be automatic upon FI invoice creation.
  • Mass form generation and sending are mandatory.

Best regards,

Constant

entry.title: The Field "DONOTCHECKMATERIAL" not available in the Billing document request ODATAV4 API
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a requirement to create the billing document using external data using API's. So we are trying to implement the External billing document request  ODATA V4 API. while analyzing the entities and structure, we are not able to find the field  "DONOTCHECKMATERIAL". this is a critical requirement as they don't have materials for billing purpose. please check and guide us with the possible solution.

The API references are as follows :
Overview | Billing Document Request | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

The reference from the help portal :
Billing Document Request | SAP Help Portal


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: GR Print Preview in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello all,

Is it possible to check the print preview before or right after conducting a Goods Receipt using the "Post Good Receipt for Purchasing Document" APP?

Thank you.

entry.title: sampling scheme ISO sampling templates
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Previously, my colleague tested the sampling scheme in the quality management module of the ByDesign product, and the system could directly apply the ISO sampling templates.

May I ask if S/4HANA Public Cloud also provides similar templates that can be applied?

Below is the ByDesign screen for reference.

Thank you!

entry.title: Restriction for changing specific Material Master data?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We would like to know if there is a way to restrict authorization to change specific Material master data items (YB-0000 and YP-0000).

We have checked the restrictions for business roles but it seems impossible to allow changes for only certain material master items.

Could you give us some advice on this?

Best Regards,

Fujita

entry.title: Unable to change Product Base Unit due to "Routings already exist that are assigned to the material"
entry.content:
We have created a Product the wrong Base unit of measurement as 'EA'. Now we have to change the Base unit of measurement as 'M'. When we try to change the unit of measurement in Change material ( MM02) Tile - System is showing error. We have checked the error in "Display Error". System is showing Quality plan group number. Actually Quality plan is deleted from our end through app Change Inspection Plan  (QP02 ) but still we're getting this error "Routings already exist that are assigned to the material".

Please guide us to change the UOM.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Sales Order Created via Client Certificate Authentication Classified as Digital Access
entry.content:
Customer is using SAP Business Process Automation (BPA) to create a Sales Order in SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public Edition) by calling OData API.

The API call is made using a client certificate authentication destination in SAP BTP, where the keystore is created from the service key of the SAP Build Process Automation subscription.

Given this setup, the created Sales Order is classified as a Digital Access document.

 

  • Is it expected that Sales Orders created via client certificate authentication are counted under Digital Access?
  • Would using a Named User with Basic Authentication or Oauth2 User token exchange authentication instead of a service key avoid the Digital Access classification?

Thanks.

entry.title: How to set up multi-currency bank?
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

In S/4 HANA Public Cloud, I want to know how to set up multi-currency in one bank. 

Please suggest

Thanks,

May
